name: Massachusetts OPSI Construction Supervisor License Verification

agency.name: Massachusetts Division of Occupational Licensure Office of Public Safety and Inspections

updateFrequency: unknown; verify against the official OPSI verification site before relying on freshness assumptions
licenseTypesIncluded: Massachusetts OPSI construction supervisor licenses exposed by the official license verification site
knownExclusions: This source is scoped to OPSI-issued licenses and does not cover every home improvement registration, local permit, or trade license in Massachusetts.
Other Massachusetts DOL boards and registration programs may require separate source entries.
rateLimitNotes: No adapter is implemented. The verification site says search results can be downloaded, but export format and redistribution terms need review.
publicRecordsNotes: Official lookup source metadata only. Absence from this source is not proof that a license, registration, or permit does not exist elsewhere.
officialBulkDownloadNotes: The official verification site says search results can be downloaded at no cost, but terms, fields, and redistribution permission require further review.
researchNotes: Registry-only source for Massachusetts OPSI construction supervisor license verification. Future work should research companion home improvement contractor registration sources.
maintainerNotes: Preserve the distinction between construction supervisor licensing, home improvement registration, trade licenses, and local permits.
